name: codex-workbench
description: A Codex workbench package with one visible skill entrypoint for project intake, AI coding state machines, change impact analysis, traceability, quality gates, review rules, and failure learning loops.

interface.shortDescription: One entry for project AI workbenches.
interface.longDescription: Codex Workbench exposes one visible skill entrypoint and bundles its own project-intake and workbench-generation scripts. Version 2.0.2 creates repository-local AGENTS.md/WORKBENCH.md files, project state, product/UX/architecture/delivery baselines, change requests, impact analysis, traceability, machine-readable workflow and feature status, deterministic quality/runtime gates, independent review prompts, validation/audit reports, failure-loop evidence, fail-closed hook error handling, and Windows-stable hook command entries. Third-party and specialist skills are optional capability packs: they can enhance design, diagrams, tests, docs, CI, security, or AI eval, but users do not need to learn or install them before the workbench can run.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Workbench to set up this project's AI workbench.
Use Codex Workbench to tell me the next step for this project.
Use Codex Workbench to create a feature work package named <feature-name>.
Use Codex Workbench to validate this project workbench.
Use Codex Workbench to preview an upgrade for this project workbench.
Use Codex Workbench to audit this project workbench for sharing.
